blocktuner.available: BlockTuner is available on this server
yacl.blocktuner.title: BlockTuner Configuration
yacl.blocktuner.group.general.descriptio: Temporary YACL screen used while migrating the old properties-based config.
yacl.blocktuner.option.key_to_piano.desc: Uses the typing keyboard as a musical keyboard.
yacl.blocktuner.option.key_signature.des: Changes the key signature value from -7 to 7.
yacl.blocktuner.option.require_ctrl_to_o: When enabled, placing a note block only opens the tuning GUI while Ctrl is held.
